mentions.note: Higher-yielding midstream energy play preferred by Cramer over Cheniere (sliding for a year). Better yield and growth profile.
Preferred midstream/LNG transport play. Strong structural exposure to energy infrastructure.

Pipeline operator with 60,000 miles infrastructure, gathering, processing, NGL, storage, LPG export. CEO Norton: LNG growing to 30 BCF by 2030 (+12 BCF/day). Bakken has 5,000 more wells; producers increasing plans. 4.85% yield. Geopolitical tailwind pulling forward growth. World changed even since last quarter.
